claim: Korea announced a national post-quantum cryptography transition master plan in July 2023.
verified_points: KISA states that Korea announced the '汎국가 양자내성암호 전환 마스터플랜' in July 2023 in cooperation with relevant ministries.
KISA lists '2023년 7월 한국 汎국가 양자내성암호 전환 마스터플랜' among PQC transition-related documents.
KISA states that from 2025 Korea has pursued the '양자내성암호 시범전환 사업' to support PQC adoption across national industry fields that need transition.

KISA states that government ministries, research institutions, domestic companies, and KISA are working on Korean PQC standardization, safety and performance criteria, pilot transition support, and migration guide development.

supplementary_evidence.finding: Reports that the National Intelligence Service and the Ministry of Science and ICT announced a draft master plan for transitioning the domestic cryptographic system to PQC on 2023-07-12.
Reports that NIS and MSIT, with related ministries, established a master plan and that KISA participated in working-level consultation for the plan.
Reports that the July 2023 Information Security Day event was hosted by MSIT, NIS, and MOIS and organized by KISIA and KISA, and introduced the PQC transition master plan.

scope_limits: The KISA official page confirms the 2023 Korean national PQC transition master plan and follow-up pilot transition direction, but does not by itself establish KISA as the sole author or co-publisher of the 2023 plan.
For the 2023 announcement actors, cite NIS and MSIT based on contemporary reporting and describe KISA as an official follow-up and implementation-related source.
Do not describe the master plan as a direct legal mandate that every organization must complete PQC migration by a specific date.
Use the plan as evidence that Korea has a national policy direction for PQC transition, not as proof that our software implements all Korean government transition requirements.
presentation_guidance: Say that Korea also set a national direction for PQC transition through the July 2023 '범국가 양자내성암호 전환 마스터플랜'.
Use the KISA page as the official source for the existence of the plan and the later pilot transition program.
When naming institutions, say NIS and MSIT announced the plan, while KISA is an official source for the national PQC transition page and pilot transition follow-up.
Connect this citation to our project only at the policy-alignment level: our system supports discovery, inventory, planning, and validation flow needed before PQC transition.
